title: Arizona DDS Pay-Scale Research Notes
description: Narrative research notes for Arizona DDS examiner and supervisor pay: administering agency (AZ DES Disability Determination Services Administration), examiner class title (Disability Determination Specialist, confirmed via job postings) with class code NOT located, ADOA HR class-spec / salary-schedule URLs, a third-party estimated salary range ($53,152–$82,282; one confirmed $65,885 data point), non-union ASPS merit-system status, and documented gaps (no AZ has no sibling scheduled-rates.json). Markdown-only state.

source.publisher: Arizona Department of Administration (ADOA) Human Resources; AZ Dept of Economic Security (DES) Disability Determination Services Administration
source.title: AZ DDS salary research notes (ADOA HR class specs; Glassdoor estimates)

notes: Computed: agency and examiner class title are confirmed via job postings, but class codes, pay-grade assignment, and the official AZ salary schedule were not located — the only quantitative figures are Glassdoor/aggregate estimates ($53,152–$82,282; one $65,885 point). Supervisor title not identified. No collective bargaining (ASPS merit system). effective_date/fiscal_year not stated in the notes so temporal_coverage is omitted. No sibling scheduled-rates.json for AZ.
